subcodes.first_line: This is a Book from Our presence unto him who hath turned towards God, the Mighty, the Bestower, that he may be assured that He remembereth whomsoever He willeth [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا کتاب من لدنا لمن اقبل الی الله العزیز الوهاب لیوقن انه یذکر من اراده انه
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @chastisement and requital, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @love of God, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
